level.instructions: Sort the incoming 2-car train [5, 2] into ascending order [2, 5] using the compare, head_split, and cons cells.
level.thoughts: The level splits a 2-car unsorted train [5, 2] into two solo cars using head_split. They are routed to the compare cell, which separates them into lower (2) and higher (5). The lower car is routed to a cons cell where it waits, while the higher car loops around to bump into it from behind, merging them back into a sorted [2, 5] train that safely enters the depot.
